title: Paste a scree shot into chat
excerpt: To be able to paste screenshots directly into chat box rather than having to save and upload!

posts.author: laurenjack (Lauren)
posts.cookedHtml: To be able to paste screenshots directly into chat box rather than having to save and upload!

posts.author: alakkotrypis (Alexander Lakkotrypis)
posts.cookedHtml:
YES!

Please, I feel like it is much easier and faster to ctrl+c, ctrl+v into the chat bubble than to select a bunch of screenshots named a variant of “Screenshot 2024-08-19 225090.png”, especially when I’m trying to re-explain a bit differently on the spot.

Please put this on the roadmap!

posts.author: dominik.hagenbucher (Dominik Hagenbucher)
posts.cookedHtml: Please add this functionality in every area where Pictures could be added.
